a:T2394,<div class="specification">
<p>A rocket moving with speed v relative to the ground emits a flash of light in the backward direction.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">An observer in the rocket measures the speed of the flash of light to be <em>c</em>.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the <strong>speed</strong> of the flash of light according to an observer on the ground using Galilean relativity.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the <strong>speed</strong> of the flash of light according to an observer on the ground using Maxwell’s theory of electromagnetism.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the <strong>speed</strong> of the flash of light according to an observer on the ground using Einstein’s theory of relativity.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","a"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.SL.TZ1.3"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","a-1-the-beginnings-of-relativity, a-2-lorentz-transformations"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p><em>c–v</em> ✔</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p><em>c</em> ✔</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p><em>c</em> ✔</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>The speed of a flash of light from different viewpoints. Most of the prepared candidates well stated the speed of the flash using Galilean relativity, Maxwell’s theory and Einstein’s theory.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>The speed of a flash of light from different viewpoints.
